pipeline.title: 观点：我为什么觉得... · 中译英

items.zh: 我觉得我们看的那部电影值得看。
items.answer: I think the movie that we watched is worth seeing.

pipeline.title: 观点：我为什么觉得... · 句型

slots: movie that we watched is worth seeing book that we read is worth reading
